Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x9568 "DEFENDER64-9568" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Defender 64.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Made the following changes to allow the fire button in port 2 start the game, not just any key:
1. Patched the JSR $FFE4 instruction at $8094 to be JSR $1000 instead 2. Added a small routine at $1000 to check the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then it sets the accumulator to $01 and returns, which causes the game to start just as if any key was pressed. If not pressed, the routine then JMPs to $FFE4 to carry on the normal code flow.
